meta.title: Bolt-Sport — Polish manufacturer of combat sports equipment
meta.description: Bolt-Sport is a Polish manufacturer of combat sports equipment. Punching bags, gloves, mats and crash mats, as well as boxing rings, MMA cages and complete training gym fit-outs.

footer.description: Polish manufacturer of combat sports equipment. We make our products in Krasiejów — from training gear to rings, MMA cages, and complete gym fit-outs.
